title: Quick Start Guide - Osprey/Tern - First screen, single earbud/pairing - zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out animation fails on the single earbud/pairing screen in Device Settings
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap Device Settings for the connected device.
Verify the earbud zooms in and the text matches the Figma Pairing screen.
Tap the blue circle button again.
Verify the screen zooms out to the original screen.
expected: The earbud zooms in with text matching the Figma Pairing screen on first tap. On second tap, the screen zooms out to the original Quick Start Guide screen.
